name: main-health: drizzle 0125 snapshot misnamed → reds required main check on all PRs
description: WI-1104 (#1589, commit 4928cc227) added migration 0125_rls_concepts_concept_mastery_policy (.sql + _journal.json idx=125) but committed its drizzle meta snapshot with a NON-STANDARD filename `apps/api/drizzle/meta/0125_rls_concepts_concept_mastery_policy.json` instead of the convention `0125_snapshot.json`. `packages/database/src/drizzle-meta-coverage.test.ts` discovers snapshots via the regex /^\d{4}_snapshot\.json$/, so it does not see tag 0125; the 'latest journal entry has a matching snapshot' assertion fails. This reds the db-migrations change-class validation (`nx run @eduagent/database:test`) which is part of the REQUIRED `main` check on EVERY PR — blocking the whole merge queue. The snapshot CONTENT is valid and chain-correct (its prevId matches 0124's id), so the fix is a rename, not a regenerate.
acceptanceCriteria: Rename `apps/api/drizzle/meta/0125_rls_concepts_concept_mastery_policy.json` → `apps/api/drizzle/meta/0125_snapshot.json` (git mv; content unchanged). Adding/fixing a meta snapshot is a FORWARD-fix — the BUG-886 immutability guard explicitly excludes `apps/api/drizzle/meta/` (scripts/check-migration-immutability.ts), so this is allowed. Verify `pnpm exec nx run @eduagent/database:test` is GREEN locally (drizzle-meta-coverage.test.ts passes, 299/299). Land as a standalone PR before the rest of the queue.
riskImpact: P0 main-health: reds the REQUIRED main check on every PR → nothing merges (gates 867, WI-1145 re-fix, WI-1153 PR #1645). Fix is a 1-file rename, zero schema/runtime change.
